Ability.Name: -- Hotkeys --
Ability.Lua:
if not leftkeydown then leftkeydown = 0 end
if modtime == nil then modtime = 0 end
if IsLeftControlKeyDown() and GetTime() - leftkeydown > 1 then leftkeydown = GetTime() if StopRota then StopRota = false PQR_WriteToChat("Rotation \124cFF15E615reenabled!") else StopRota = true PQR_WriteToChat("Rotation \124cFFE61515stopped!") end end
if not AOE then function AOE() if AoE == true then return true else return false end end end
local _, _palcls = UnitClass("player") if _palcls == "PALADIN" then PQR_OrigAOE = PQR_OrigAOE or AOE function AOE() if PQR_RetPackAoE == true and PQR_CountMeleeEnemiesNearPlayer and PQR_CountMeleeEnemiesNearPlayer() >= 3 then return true end return PQR_OrigAOE() end end
if not rightkeydown then rightkeydown = 0 end
if modtime == nil then modtime = 0 end
if IsRightAltKeyDown() and not GetCurrentKeyBoardFocus() and GetTime() - modtime > 0.3 then modtime = GetTime() if AoE then AoE = false PQR_WriteToChat("\124c00FFFC01AOE stoped!") else AoE = true PQR_WriteToChat("\124c00fEBA0EAOE enabled!") end end if PQR_UpdateStatusOverlay then PQR_UpdateStatusOverlay() end

Ability.Name: -- Offensive Spells --
Ability.Lua:
local buff = { 642, 45438, 31224, 23920, 33786, 19263, 21892, 40733 } local mob = { "Training Dummy", "Raider's Training Dummy" } local elite = { } local noaggromobs = nil local immunity = nil local eliteboss = nil
for i,v in ipairs(buff) do if UnitBuffID("target",v) then immunity = 1 end end
for i,v in ipairs(mob) do if UnitName("target") == v then noaggromobs = 1 end end
if immunity or UnitCanAttack("player","target") == nil or (UnitAffectingCombat("target") == nil and noaggromobs == nil and UnitIsPlayer("target") == nil) or tonumber(UnitGUID("target"):sub(5,5),16) == 4 then return true end
for i,v in ipairs(elite) do if UnitName("target") == v then eliteboss = 1 end end
IsBoss = nil function IsBoss() if UnitExists("target") and ( UnitLevel("target") == -1 or eliteboss ) or tonumber(UnitGUID("target"):sub(5,5),16) == 4 then return true end end

Ability.Name: -- Start Fight --
Ability.Lua: if StopRota or IsMounted() or UnitInVehicle("player") or UnitIsDeadOrGhost("target") or UnitIsDeadOrGhost("player") or UnitChannelInfo("player") ~= nil or UnitCastingInfo("player") ~= nil or UnitBuff("target", 59301) or UnitBuff("player", GetSpellInfo(430)) or UnitBuff("player", GetSpellInfo(433)) then return true end

Ability.Name: -- Functions --
Ability.Lua:
if not functionsloaded then
-- Glyph Check -- glyph = function(glyphID) local hasglyph = false; local i = 1; local glyph = GetGlyphSocketInfo(i); while glyph do local id = select(3, GetGlyphSocketInfo(i)); if id == glyphID then hasglyph = true; break; end i = i + 1; glyph = GetGlyphSocketInfo(i); end return hasglyph; end
-- Check target -- function CanAttack() if UnitExists("target") and UnitCanAttack("player", "target") == 1 then return true end end
function UnX() if UnitExists("target") then return true end end
-- Check if player move -- function pMove() if GetUnitSpeed("player") >= 3 then return true end end
-- Check if player stay -- function pStay() if GetUnitSpeed("player") == 0 then return true end end
-- Combat Check -- function inCombat() if UnitAffectingCombat("player") ~= nil then return true end end
-- Get HP simple -- function getHp(unit) if UnitExists(unit) ~= nil then return 100 * UnitHealth(unit) / UnitHealthMax(unit) end end
-- Get Mana simple -- function getMana(unit) if UnitExists(unit) ~= nil then return 100 * UnitPower(unit) / UnitPowerMax(unit) end end
-- Calculate HP simple -- function CalculateHP(t) local ActualWithIncoming = 100 * UnitHealth(t) / UnitHealthMax(t) if ActualWithIncoming then return ActualWithIncoming else return 100 end end
-- Spell Cooldown remaining check -- CooldownRemains = nil function CooldownRemains(spellID) local start, duration, enable = GetSpellCooldown(spellID) if ( start > 0 and duration > 1.5 ) and not gcd() then return start + duration - GetTime() else return false end end
-- Item Cooldown remaining check -- ItemCooldownRemains = nil function ItemCooldownRemains(itemID) local start, duration, enable = GetItemCooldown(itemID) if ( start > 0 and duration > 1.5 ) then return start + duration - GetTime() else return false end end
-- GCD Check -- function gcd() local _, d = GetSpellCooldown(61304) if (d ~= 0) then return true else return false end end -- Range Check Simple -- function rangeCheck(spellid,unit) if IsSpellInRange(GetSpellInfo(spellid),unit) == 1 and not gcd() then return true end end
-- Threat -- function threat(t) if UnitExists(t) and UnitThreatSituation(t) ~= nil then return UnitThreatSituation(t) else return 0 end end
-- Validator -- valid = nil function valid(t, spellid) if UnitExists(t) and not UnitIsDeadOrGhost(t) and UnitCanAttack("player", t) == 1 and UnitDebuffID("target", 33786) == nil and IsUsableSpell(GetSpellInfo(spellid)) == 1 and IsSpellInRange(GetSpellInfo(spellid), t) == 1 then return true else return false end end
message("Project closed!\nUsing this tool may cause ban!\nVisit https://darhanger.github.io/rotations/");
-- Cheking ForB -- function checkForbearance(unit) if UnitDebuffID(unit, 25771) == nil then return true else return false end end
function PQR_CountMeleeEnemiesNearPlayer() local seen = {} local function tag(unit) if UnitExists(unit) and not UnitIsDead(unit) and UnitCanAttack("player", unit) and CheckInteractDistance(unit, 3) then local g = UnitGUID(unit) if g then seen[g] = true end end end tag("target") tag("focus") tag("mouseover") for i = 1, 5 do tag("boss"..i) end local members = GetNumPartyMembers() local group = "party" if GetNumRaidMembers() > 0 then members = GetNumRaidMembers() group = "raid" end for i = 1, members do tag(group..i.."target") end local n = 0 for _ in pairs(seen) do n = n + 1 end return n end
functionsloaded = true if not PQR_StatusOverlayLib then PQR_StatusOverlayLib = true if PQR_OverlayBuffEnabled == nil then PQR_OverlayBuffEnabled = false end if PQR_RetPackAoE == nil then PQR_RetPackAoE = false end if PQR_RetDivinePleaLowMana == nil then PQR_RetDivinePleaLowMana = false end function PQR_CheckBtn(btn) return btn and btn:GetChecked() end function PQR_CreateStatusOverlay() if PQR_StatusOverlayFrame then return end local f = CreateFrame("Frame", "PQR_StatusOverlayFrame", UIParent) PQR_StatusOverlayFrame = f f:SetWidth(300) f:SetHeight(178) f:SetPoint("TOP", UIParent, "TOP", 0, -28) f:SetFrameStrata("MEDIUM") local bg = f:CreateTexture(nil, "BACKGROUND") bg:SetAllPoints() bg:SetTexture(0, 0, 0, 0.55) local t = f:CreateFontString(nil, "OVERLAY", "GameFontNormalSmall") t:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", f, "TOPLEFT", 8, -6) t:SetJustifyH("LEFT") t:SetTextColor(1, 1, 1, 1) PQR_StatusOverlayTitle = t t:SetText("PQR") local l1 = f:CreateFontString(nil, "OVERLAY", "GameFontNormalSmall") l1:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", f, "TOPLEFT", 8, -22) l1:SetJustifyH("LEFT") PQR_StatusOverlayLine1 = l1 local l2 = f:CreateFontString(nil, "OVERLAY", "GameFontNormalSmall") l2:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", f, "TOPLEFT", 8, -38) l2:SetJustifyH("LEFT") PQR_StatusOverlayLine2 = l2 local l3 = f:CreateFontString(nil, "OVERLAY", "GameFontNormalSmall") l3:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", f, "TOPLEFT", 8, -54) l3:SetJustifyH("LEFT") PQR_StatusOverlayLine3 = l3 local cbR = CreateFrame("CheckButton", "PQR_StatusOverlay_cbRot", f, "UICheckButtonTemplate") cbR:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", f, "TOPLEFT", 4, -68) cbR:SetScript("OnClick", function(self) StopRota = not PQR_CheckBtn(self) end) _G[cbR:GetName().."Text"]:SetText("Rotation enabled") PQR_StatusOverlay_cbRot = cbR local cbA = CreateFrame("CheckButton", "PQR_StatusOverlay_cbAoE", f, "UICheckButtonTemplate") cbA:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", f, "TOPLEFT", 4, -88) cbA:SetScript("OnClick", function(self) if AoE ~= nil then AoE = not not PQR_CheckBtn(self) end end) _G[cbA:GetName().."Text"]:SetText("AoE mode (manual)") PQR_StatusOverlay_cbAoE = cbA local cbB = CreateFrame("CheckButton", "PQR_StatusOverlay_cbBuff", f, "UICheckButtonTemplate") cbB:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", f, "TOPLEFT", 4, -108) cbB:SetScript("OnClick", function(self) PQR_OverlayBuffEnabled = not not PQR_CheckBtn(self) end) _G[cbB:GetName().."Text"]:SetText("Extra toggle (profile hook)") PQR_StatusOverlay_cbBuff = cbB local cbP = CreateFrame("CheckButton", "PQR_StatusOverlay_cbPack", f, "UICheckButtonTemplate") cbP:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", f, "TOPLEFT", 4, -128) cbP:SetScript("OnClick", function(self) PQR_RetPackAoE = not not PQR_CheckBtn(self) end) _G[cbP:GetName().."Text"]:SetText("Ret: auto AoE (3+ melee enemies)") PQR_StatusOverlay_cbPack = cbP local cbD = CreateFrame("CheckButton", "PQR_StatusOverlay_cbDPlea", f, "UICheckButtonTemplate") cbD:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", f, "TOPLEFT", 4, -148) cbD:SetScript("OnClick", function(self) PQR_RetDivinePleaLowMana = not not PQR_CheckBtn(self) end) _G[cbD:GetName().."Text"]:SetText("Ret: Divine Plea below 30% mana") PQR_StatusOverlay_cbDPlea = cbD PQR_OverlayHUD_Accum = 0 f:SetScript("OnUpdate", function(self, elapsed) PQR_OverlayHUD_Accum = PQR_OverlayHUD_Accum + elapsed if PQR_OverlayHUD_Accum >= 0.15 then PQR_OverlayHUD_Accum = 0 if PQR_UpdateStatusOverlay then PQR_UpdateStatusOverlay() end end end) end function PQR_UpdateStatusOverlay() if not PQR_StatusOverlayFrame then PQR_CreateStatusOverlay() end local _, classToken = UnitClass("player") PQR_StatusOverlayTitle:SetText(classToken or "PQR") local sbad = StopRota and "|cffff4444STOPPED|r" or "|cff44ff44RUNNING|r" PQR_StatusOverlayLine1:SetText("Rotation: "..sbad) local aoeStr = "" if AoE ~= nil then aoeStr = (AoE == true) and "|cff44ff44Manual AoE ON|r" or "|cffff8888Manual AoE OFF|r" elseif type(AOE) == "function" then aoeStr = AOE() and "|cff44ff44AoE ON|r" or "|cffff8888AoE OFF|r" else aoeStr = "|cffaaaaaaAoE n/a|r" end if classToken == "PALADIN" and PQR_CountMeleeEnemiesNearPlayer then local pc = PQR_CountMeleeEnemiesNearPlayer() if PQR_RetPackAoE == true and pc >= 3 then aoeStr = aoeStr.." | |cff44ff44Pack"..pc.." (auto)|r" elseif PQR_RetPackAoE == true then aoeStr = aoeStr.." | Pack:"..pc end end PQR_StatusOverlayLine2:SetText(aoeStr) local parts = {} if MS ~= nil then table.insert(parts, (MS == true) and "Mind Sear |cff44ff44ON|r" or "Mind Sear |cffff8888OFF|r") end if HN ~= nil then table.insert(parts, (HN == true) and "Hurricane |cff44ff44ON|r" or "Hurricane |cffff8888OFF|r") end if VoL ~= nil then table.insert(parts, (VoL == true) and "Volley |cff44ff44ON|r" or "Volley |cffff8888OFF|r") end if COL ~= nil then table.insert(parts, (COL == true) and "Chain Lightning |cff44ff44ON|r" or "Chain Lightning |cffff8888OFF|r") end if Heal ~= nil then table.insert(parts, (Heal == true) and "Chain Heal spam |cff44ff44ON|r" or "Chain Heal spam |cffff8888OFF|r") end if ELE ~= nil then table.insert(parts, (ELE == true) and "Elem mode |cff44ff44ON|r" or "Elem mode |cffff8888OFF|r") end if SoC ~= nil or RoF ~= nil then local s = "" if SoC ~= nil then s = (SoC == true) and "SoC |cff44ff44ON|r" or "SoC |cffff8888OFF|r" end if RoF ~= nil then s = s..((s ~= "") and " " or "")..((RoF == true) and "RoF |cff44ff44ON|r" or "RoF |cffff8888OFF|r") end table.insert(parts, s) end if Opener ~= nil then table.insert(parts, Opener and "Opener: Garrote" or "Opener: Ambush") end local extra = (#parts > 0) and table.concat(parts, " | ") or " " PQR_StatusOverlayLine3:SetText(extra) if PQR_StatusOverlay_cbRot then PQR_StatusOverlay_cbRot:SetChecked(StopRota ~= true) end if PQR_StatusOverlay_cbAoE then if AoE ~= nil then PQR_StatusOverlay_cbAoE:Show() PQR_StatusOverlay_cbAoE:SetChecked(AoE == true) else PQR_StatusOverlay_cbAoE:Hide() end end if PQR_StatusOverlay_cbBuff then PQR_StatusOverlay_cbBuff:SetChecked(not not PQR_OverlayBuffEnabled) if classToken == "PALADIN" then _G[PQR_StatusOverlay_cbBuff:GetName().."Text"]:SetText("Sacred Shield (optional)") PQR_StatusOverlay_cbBuff:Show() else _G[PQR_StatusOverlay_cbBuff:GetName().."Text"]:SetText("Extra toggle (profile hook)") PQR_StatusOverlay_cbBuff:Show() end end if PQR_StatusOverlay_cbPack then if classToken == "PALADIN" then PQR_StatusOverlay_cbPack:Show() PQR_StatusOverlay_cbPack:SetChecked(not not PQR_RetPackAoE) else PQR_StatusOverlay_cbPack:Hide() end end if PQR_StatusOverlay_cbDPlea then if classToken == "PALADIN" then PQR_StatusOverlay_cbDPlea:Show() PQR_StatusOverlay_cbDPlea:SetChecked(not not PQR_RetDivinePleaLowMana) else PQR_StatusOverlay_cbDPlea:Hide() end end end end end

Ability.Name: All:Mouseover Skill
Ability.Lua: if UnitAffectingCombat("player") and IsMouseButtonDown() then RunMacroText("/click "..GetMouseFocus():GetName()) end

Ability.Name: Use:Trinkets/Hands
Ability.Lua:
local _,cd,havecd = GetInventoryItemCooldown("player",13)
if cd == 0 and havecd == 1 and IsBoss() and CanAttack() and rangeCheck(35395, "target") then UseInventoryItem(13) return true end
local _,cd,havecd = GetInventoryItemCooldown("player",14)
if cd == 0 and havecd == 1 and IsBoss() and CanAttack() and rangeCheck(35395, "target") then UseInventoryItem(14) return true end
local _,cd,havecd = GetInventoryItemCooldown("player",10)
if cd == 0 and havecd == 1 and IsBoss() and CanAttack() and rangeCheck(35395, "target") then UseInventoryItem(10) return true end

Ability.Name: -- All:Racial --
Ability.Lua:
local debuff = { 6215, 8122, 5484, 2637, 5246, 6358 } local hracial = { 33697, 20572, 33702, 26297 } local alracial = { 20594, 28880 } local hrace = { "Troll", "Orc" } local alrace = { "Dwarf", "Draenei" } local myrace = UnitRace("player")
-- Undead -- for i = 1, #debuff do if UnitDebuffID("player",debuff[i]) and UnitRace("player") == "Undead" and IsSpellKnown(7744) and not CooldownRemains(7744) and CanAttack() then CastSpellByID(7744) return true end end
-- Horde race -- if IsBoss() and CanAttack() and tContains(hrace, UnitRace("player")) then for i = 1, #hracial do if IsSpellKnown(hracial[i]) and not CooldownRemains(hracial[i]) then CastSpellByID(hracial[i]) return true end end end
-- Ally race -- if CanAttack() and getHp("player") <= 35 and tContains(alrace, UnitRace("player")) then for i = 1, #alracial do if IsSpellKnown(alracial[i]) and not CooldownRemains(alracial[i]) then CastSpellByID(alracial[i]) return true end end end

Ability.Name: All:Divine Shield
Ability.Lua: if getHp("player") < 20 and not CooldownRemains(642) and checkForbearance("player") then return true end

Ability.Name: All:Divine Protection
Ability.Lua: if getHp("player") < 30 and not CooldownRemains(498) and checkForbearance("player") then return true end

Ability.Name: H:Beacon of Light
Ability.Lua:
local BofL, _, _, _, _, _, timer = UnitBuffID("focus", 53563, "player") local focus = UnitExists("focus")
if focus ~= nil and UnitIsDeadOrGhost("focus") == nil and IsSpellInRange(GetSpellInfo(53563), "focus") == 1 then if BofL ~= nil then if timer - GetTime() < 10 then return true else return false end else return true end else return false end

Ability.Name: H:Sacred Shield
Ability.Lua:
local SSH, _, _, _, _, _, timer = UnitBuffID("focus", 53601, "player") local focus = UnitExists("focus")
if focus ~= nil and UnitIsDeadOrGhost("focus") == nil and IsSpellInRange(GetSpellInfo(53601), "focus") == 1 then if SSH ~= nil then if timer - GetTime() < 5 then return true else return false end else return true end else return false end

Ability.Name: H:Divine Plea
Ability.Lua: if getMana("player") <= 75 and lowhpmembers <= 2 and PQR_CustomTargetHP > 70 then return true end

Ability.Name: H:Divine Illumination
Ability.Lua: if (dplea ~= nil and awrath == nil) or lowhpmembers >= 5 or PQR_CustomTargetHP < 30 then return true end

Ability.Name: H:Hand of Sacrifice
Ability.Lua: if getHp("player") > 60 and PQR_CustomTargetHP < 30 then return true end

Ability.Name: H:Lay on Hands
Ability.Lua: if PQR_CustomTargetHP < 15 and checkForbearance(PQR_CustomTarget) then return true end

Ability.Name: H:Holy Shock
Ability.Lua: if PQR_CustomTargetHP < 60 and PQR_IsCastingSpell(48825) == false or pMove() and not gcd() then return true end

Ability.Name: H:Holy Light
Ability.Lua: if PQR_CustomTargetHP < 90 and PQR_IsCastingSpell(48782) == false and pStay() and not gcd() then return true end

Ability.Name: H:Flash of Light
Ability.Lua: if PQR_CustomTargetHP < 70 and ( IoL or AoW ) and not gcd() then return true end

Ability.Name: H:Cleanse
Ability.Lua:
local i = 1 local baddispel = nil local goodtodispel = nil
local dontdispel = { 34916, 34917, 34919, 48159, 48160, 30404, 30405, 31117, 34438, 35183, 43522, 47841, 47843, 65812, 68154, 68155, 68156, 44461, 55359, 55360, 55361, 55362, 61429, 30108, 34914, 74562, 74792, 70867, 70338, 70405 } for _,v in ipairs(dontdispel) do if UnitDebuffID(PQR_CustomTarget,v) then baddispel = 1 end end
local i = 1 local buff,_,_,count,bufftype,duration = UnitDebuff(PQR_CustomTarget, i) while buff do if ((bufftype == "Magic") or (bufftype == "Disease") or (bufftype == "Poison")) and duration > 2 and count ~= 1 and not baddispel and not gcd() and UnitIsFriend("player",PQR_CustomTarget) then return true end i = i + 1; buff,_,_,count,bufftype,duration = UnitDebuff(PQR_CustomTarget, i) end

Ability.Name: H:Seal of Light
Ability.Lua: if not SoL and AOE() == false then return true end

Ability.Name: H:Avenging Wrath
Ability.Lua: if ( dplea ~= nil and dillum == nil ) or lowhpmembers >= 5 or PQR_CustomTargetHP < 30 then return true end

Ability.Name: P:Divine Plea
Ability.Lua: if not dplea and CanAttack() then return true end

Ability.Name: P:Hammer of the Righteous
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and valid("target", 53595) and rangeCheck(53595, "target") and not CooldownRemains(53595) then return true end

Ability.Name: P:Holy Shield
Ability.Lua: if not hshield and CanAttack() and not CooldownRemains(48952) and rangeCheck(53595, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: P:Shield of Righteousness
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and valid("target", 61411) and rangeCheck(61411, "target") and not CooldownRemains(61411) then return true end

Ability.Name: P:Avenger's Shield
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and rangeCheck(48827, "target") and not CooldownRemains(48827) then return true end

Ability.Name: P:Righteous Fury
Ability.Lua: if not rFury and not UnitIsDeadOrGhost("player") then return true end

Ability.Name: R:Exorcism
Ability.Lua: if AoW and CanAttack() and ( rangeCheck(48801, "target") or not rangeCheck(35395, "target") ) and not CooldownRemains(48801) then return true end

Ability.Name: R:Sacred Shield
Ability.Lua:
if PQR_OverlayBuffEnabled ~= true then return false end local SSH, _, _, _, _, _, timer = UnitBuffID("player", 53601)
if SSH ~= nil then if timer - GetTime() < 5 then return true else return false end else return true end

Ability.Name: R:Divine Plea
Ability.Lua: if not CanAttack() then return false end if dplea then return false end if CooldownRemains(54428) then return false end local mana = getMana("player") if mana >= 50 then return false end if PQR_RetDivinePleaLowMana == true and mana >= 30 then return false end return true end

Ability.Name: R:Divine Storm
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and rangeCheck(35395, "target") and not CooldownRemains(53385) then return true end

Ability.Name: R:Hammer of Wrath
Ability.Lua: if valid("target", 48806) and CanAttack() and getHp("target") <= 20 and rangeCheck(48806, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: R:Hand of Salvation
Ability.Lua: if UnitThreatSituation("player") == 3 and not CooldownRemains(1038) then return true end

Ability.Name: R:Lay on Hands
Ability.Lua: if getHp("player") < 20 and checkForbearance("player") then return true end

Ability.Name: R:Holy Wrath
R:Crusader Strike
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and rangeCheck(35395, "target") and not CooldownRemains(35395) then return true end

Ability.Name: R:Judgement of Wisdom
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and rangeCheck(53408, "target") and not CooldownRemains(53408) then return true end

Ability.Name: R:Seal of Command
Ability.Lua: if not SoC and AOE() == true and IsSpellKnown(20375) then return true end

Ability.Name: R:Consecration
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and rangeCheck(35395, "target") and not CooldownRemains(48819) then return true end

Ability.Name: R:Avenging Wrath
Ability.Lua: if IsBoss() and CanAttack() and not CooldownRemains(31884) and rangeCheck(35395, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: R:Crusader Strike (S)
R:Judgement of Light
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and rangeCheck(20271, "target") and not CooldownRemains(20271) then return true end

Ability.Name: R:Judgement of Justice
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and rangeCheck(53407, "target") and not CooldownRemains(53407) then return true end

Ability.Name: R:Flash of Light
Ability.Lua: if getHp("player") < 60 and AoW then return true end

Ability.Name: R:Consecration (A)
Ability.Lua: if AOE() == true and CanAttack() and getMana("player") > 30 and ( rangeCheck(35395, "target") or rangeCheck(53595, "target") ) and not CooldownRemains(48819) then return true end

Ability.Name: P:Divine Sacrifice
Ability.Lua: if lowhpmembers >= 4 or PQR_CustomTargetHP < 35 then return true end

Ability.Name: P:Exorcism (S)
Ability.Lua: if IsLeftShiftKeyDown() and GetCurrentKeyBoardFocus() == nil and AoW then return true end

Ability.Name: -- DarhangeR --
Ability.Lua: -- I'm the original developer of dat profiles. Any changes, copying or sharing without my knowledge direct copyright infringement. For more info: -- Discord: https://discord.com/users/250267265285488641

Ability.Name: All:Seal of Righteousness
Ability.Lua: if not SoR then return true end

Ability.Name: R:Seal of Corruption/Vengeance
Ability.Lua:
if IsSpellKnown(53736) then if not (SoCr or SoV) and AOE() == false then CastSpellByID(53736) return true end end
if IsSpellKnown(31801) then if not (SoV or SoCr) and AOE() == false then CastSpellByID(31801) return true end end

Ability.Name: -- Paladin Stuff --
Ability.Lua: -- Paladin Stuff -- -- Dots / Debuffs -- HJoL = UnitDebuffID("target", 20185, "player") -- Procs -- AoW = UnitBuffID("player", 59578) IoL = UnitBuffID("player", 54149) -- Buffs -- votebuff = UnitBuffID("player",35912) GBoS = UnitBuffID("player",25899) rFury = UnitBuffID("player", 25780) dplea = UnitBuffID("player", 54428) dillum = UnitBuffID("player", 31842) awrath = UnitBuffID("player", 31884) hshield = UnitBuffID("player",48952) -- Seals -- SoR = UnitBuffID("player", 21084) SoL = UnitBuffID("player", 20165) SoJ = UnitBuffID("player", 20164) SoC = UnitBuffID("player", 20375) SoW = UnitBuffID("player", 20166) SoV = UnitBuffID("player", 31801) SoCr = UnitBuffID("player", 53736) if PQR_UpdateStatusOverlay then PQR_UpdateStatusOverlay() end

Ability.Name: H:Purify
Ability.Lua:
local buff = { } local group = "party" local members = GetNumPartyMembers() if GetNumRaidMembers() > 0 then group = "raid" members = GetNumRaidMembers() end
for i = 0, members, 1 do if i==0 then mem = "player" else mem = group..tostring(i) end if UnitInRange(mem) and UnitIsDeadOrGhost(mem) == nil then local candispel = 1 for k,v in ipairs(buff) do if UnitDebuffID(mem,v) then candispel = nil end end local j = 1 local debuff,_,_,count,bufftype,dur = UnitDebuff(mem, j) while debuff do if ((bufftype == "Disease") or (bufftype == "Poison")) and dur > 1 and candispel then CastSpellByID(1152,mem) return true end j = j + 1; debuff,_,_,count,bufftype,duration = UnitDebuff(mem, j) end end end

Ability.Name: All:Cancel RFury
Ability.Lua:
local p="player" for i=1,40
do local _,_,_,_,_,_,_,u,_,_,s=UnitBuff(p,i) if u==p and s==25780 then CancelUnitBuff(p,i) break end end

Ability.Name: H:Turn Evil
Ability.Lua:
local TU = UnitDebuffID("focus", 10326) local HW = UnitDebuffID("focus", 2812) local hasFocus = UnitExists("focus") local type = UnitCreatureType("focus") local Meta = UnitBuffID("focus", 59672)
if hasFocus ~= nil then if type == "Undead" or type == "Demon" or Meta ~= nil then if TU == nil and HW == nil then return true end end end

Ability.Name: -- Heal Engine --
Ability.Lua:
-- Simplest Heal Eng -- if UnitExists("target") and UnitIsDead("target") == nil and UnitIsFriend("player", "target") and UnitCanCooperate("player","target") and UnitHasVehicleUI("target") == false and UnitDebuffID("target", 69065) == nil and UnitDebuffID("target", 70157) == nil then PQR_CustomTarget = "target" PQR_CustomTargetHP = 100 * UnitHealth("target") / UnitHealthMax("target") else
PQR_CustomTarget = "player" PQR_CustomTargetHP = 100 * UnitHealth("player") / UnitHealthMax("player") local group = "party" local members = GetNumPartyMembers() lowhpmembers = 0
if GetNumRaidMembers() > 0 then group = "raid" members = GetNumRaidMembers() end
for i = 1, members, 1 do local member = group..tostring(i) local memberhp = 100 * UnitHealth(member) / UnitHealthMax(member) if UnitInRange(member) and UnitIsFriend("player", member) and UnitIsDeadOrGhost(member) == nil then if UnitGroupRolesAssigned(member) == "TANK" then memberhp = memberhp - 1 end if UnitThreatSituation(member) == 3 then memberhp = memberhp - 3 end if UnitBuffID(member, 53563) ~= nil then memberhp = memberhp + 7 end if memberhp < 85 then lowhpmembers = lowhpmembers +1 end if memberhp < PQR_CustomTargetHP then PQR_CustomTarget = member PQR_CustomTargetHP = memberhp end end end end
if view == nil then view = true local eventframe = CreateFrame("FRAME") print("\124cFFE61515DO NOT TARGET A FRIENDLY PLAYER!") print("\124cFFE61515НЕ ВЫБИРАТЬ В КАЧЕСТВИ ЦЕЛИ СОЮЗНИКА!") eventframe:RegisterEvent("EXECUTE_CHAT_LINE") end

Ability.Name: -- Heal Engine (Pet also) --
Ability.Lua:
-- Simplest Heal Eng -- if UnitExists("target") and UnitIsDead("target") == nil and UnitIsFriend("player", "target") and UnitCanCooperate("player","target") and UnitHasVehicleUI("target") == false and UnitDebuffID("target", 69065) == nil and UnitDebuffID("target", 70157) == nil then PQR_CustomTarget = "target" PQR_CustomTargetHP = 100 * UnitHealth("target") / UnitHealthMax("target") else
PQR_CustomTarget = "player" PQR_CustomTargetHP = 100 * UnitHealth("player") / UnitHealthMax("player") local group = "party" local members = GetNumPartyMembers() lowhpmembers = 0 lowhpmemberspets = 0
if GetNumRaidMembers() > 0 then group = "raid" members = GetNumRaidMembers() end
for i = 1, members, 1 do local member = group..tostring(i) local memberhp = 100 * UnitHealth(member) / UnitHealthMax(member) if UnitInRange(member) and UnitIsFriend("player", member) and UnitIsDeadOrGhost(member) == nil then if UnitGroupRolesAssigned(member) == "TANK" then memberhp = memberhp - 1 end if UnitThreatSituation(member) == 3 then memberhp = memberhp - 3 end if UnitBuffID(member, 53563) ~= nil then memberhp = memberhp + 7 end if memberhp < 85 then lowhpmembers = lowhpmembers +1 end if memberhp < PQR_CustomTargetHP then PQR_CustomTarget = member PQR_CustomTargetHP = memberhp end end end
if lowhpmembers == 0 then for i = 1, members, 1 do local memberpet = group..tostring"pet"..tostring(i) local memberpethp = 100 * UnitHealth(memberpet) / UnitHealthMax(memberpet) if UnitInRange(memberpet) and UnitIsFriend("player", memberpet) and UnitIsDeadOrGhost(memberpet) == nil then if memberpethp < 85 then lowhpmemberspets = lowhpmemberspets +1 end PQR_CustomTarget = memberpet PQR_CustomTargetHP = memberpethp PQR_CustomTargetHP = 100 * UnitHealth(PQR_CustomTarget) / UnitHealthMax(PQR_CustomTarget) end end end end
if view == nil then view = true local eventframe = CreateFrame("FRAME") print("\124cFFE61515DO NOT TARGET A FRIENDLY PLAYER!") print("\124cFFE61515НЕ ВЫБИРАТЬ В КАЧЕСТВИ ЦЕЛИ СОЮЗНИКА!") eventframe:RegisterEvent("EXECUTE_CHAT_LINE") end

Ability.Name: -- All:Mouseover --
Ability.Lua: if UnitAffectingCombat("player") and IsMouseButtonDown() then RunMacroText("/click "..GetMouseFocus():GetName()) end

Ability.Name: H:Judgement of Light
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and rangeCheck(20271, "target") and not CooldownRemains(20271) and not HJoL then return true end

Ability.Name: -- Autotarget script --
Ability.Lua: if UnitAffectingCombat("player") and not UnitExists("target") and not SpellIsTargeting() then RunMacroText("/targetenemy") return true end

Ability.Name: -- All:Healthstone --
Ability.Lua:
local stones = { 36892, 36893, 36894 }
for i = 1, #stones do if getHp("player") <= 25 and GetItemCount(stones[i]) >= 1 and not ItemCooldownRemains(stones[i]) then UseItemByName(stones[i]) end end

Ability.Name: -- All:Potions --
-- Offensive Spells (H) --
Ability.Lua:
local mob = { "Training Dummy", "Raider's Training Dummy" } local elite = { } local noaggromobs = nil local eliteboss = nil
for i,v in ipairs(mob) do if UnitName("target") == v then noaggromobs = 1 end end
if UnitCanAttack("player","target") == nil or (UnitAffectingCombat("target") == nil and noaggromobs == nil and UnitIsPlayer("target") == nil) then return true end
for i,v in ipairs(elite) do if UnitName("target") == v then eliteboss = 1 end end
IsBoss = nil function IsBoss() if UnitExists("target") and ( UnitLevel("target") == -1 or eliteboss ) then return true end end

Ability.Name: R:Judgements (PRO)
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and rangeCheck(20271, "target") and not CooldownRemains(20271) then if getMana("player") < 30 and getHp("player") >= 70 then CastSpellByID(53408) end CastSpellByID(20271) return true end

Ability.Name: P:SoCr or SoV / SoL
Ability.Lua:
if glyph(56416) and IsSpellKnown(53736) then if not (SoCr or SoV or SoL) and AOE() == false then CastSpellByID(53736) return true end end
if glyph(56416) and IsSpellKnown(31801) then if not (SoV or SoCr or SoL) and AOE() == false then CastSpellByID(31801) return true end end
if not SoL and not glyph(56416) and AOE() == false then CastSpellByID(20165) return true end

Ability.Name: H:Cleanse (Self)
Ability.Lua:
local i = 1 local badCleanse = nil local goodCleanse = nil
local badCleanse = { 34916, 34917, 34919, 48159, 48160, 30404, 30405, 31117, 34438, 35183, 43522, 47841, 47843, 65812, 68154, 68155, 68156, 44461, 55359, 55360, 55361, 55362, 61429, 30108, 34914, 74562, 74792, 70867, 70338, 70405 } for _,v in ipairs(dontdispel) do if UnitDebuffID("player",v) then badCleanse = 1 end end
local buff,_,_,count,bufftype,duration = UnitDebuff("player", i) while buff do if ((bufftype == "Magic") or (bufftype == "Disease") or (bufftype == "Poison")) and duration > 2 and count ~= 1 and not badCleanse then return true end i = i + 1; buff,_,_,count,bufftype,duration = UnitDebuff("player", i) end
